title: AN ACT TO CHANGE THE NAME OF BARRIO HINUBUAN, MUNICIPALITY OF GASAN, PROVINCE OF MARINDUQUE, TO ANTIPOLO.

chunks.text:
H. No. 5630 / 53 OG No. 16, 5152 (August 31, 1957)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 1738, June 21, 1957 ]

AN ACT TO CHANGE THE NAME OF BARRIO HINUBUAN, MUNICIPALITY OF GASAN, PROVINCE OF MARINDUQUE, TO ANTIPOLO.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of barrio Hinubuan, Municipality of Gasan, Province of Marinduque, is hereby changed to Antipolo.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 21, 1957.
